notes: Applied to every persisted entity/table/store in inventories/data-entity.json.

steps.title: Schema and forward migration for {name}
steps.description: Define {name} schema with constraints and indexes per query patterns in 03-TARGET-ARCHITECTURE.md; write the forward migration.
acceptance_criteria: constraints enforce invariants at the storage layer
gates: migration applies clean on fresh + existing db

steps.title: Rollback path for {name} migration
steps.description: Write and test the down-migration or documented recovery procedure for {name}; no data-loss surprises.
acceptance_criteria: up-down-up cycle preserves data in test

steps.title: Typed data-access layer for {name}
steps.description: Expose {name} through a typed repository/query layer; no raw queries from feature code.
acceptance_criteria: all reads/writes go through the layer

steps.title: Corruption/partial-write recovery for {name}
steps.description: Handle corrupted or partially-written {name} state: detect, quarantine or repair, and telemetry the event; product must not brick on bad data.
acceptance_criteria: injected corruption is detected and recovered or safely quarantined in tests

steps.title: Data-layer tests and fixtures for {name}
steps.description: Unit + integration tests for {name} access layer; seed fixtures for downstream test suites.

steps.title: Query performance budget for {name}
steps.description: Benchmark {name} hot queries at realistic volume against budget; verify index usage; cap result sets.
acceptance_criteria: hot queries within budget at 10x current volume
no full scans on hot paths
